name: Paragon
effect: Friendly creatures always deal maximum and take minimum Damage.

name: Swashbuckler
effect: Heroic Strike deals +{0} basic Damage.

name: Ascendant
effect: All the hero’s spells always cost 0 mana.

name: Grand Inquisitor
effect: Enemy hero can use each spell only once per battle.

name: Harbinger of Doom
effect: Enemy creatures always have their minimum possible Luck and will always land an Unlucky Strike when attacking.

name: Walking Rot
effect: All enemies always have their minimum possible Morale.

name: Chronomancer
effect: Necromancy works for all creatures and not just the Undead.

name: Soulweaver
effect: After an enemy stack is killed in battle, a temporary stack of friendly Wights appears in their place.

name: Fortune’s Favored
effect: Friendly creatures have their maximum possible Luck and will always land a Lucky Strike when attacking.

name: Wellspring of Vigor
effect: Generates maximum Focus Charges at the beginning of each round.

name: Celestial Envoy
effect: The hero can use all spells.

name: Heaven’s Fury
effect: Heroic Strike deals Damage to all enemies in a 1‑hex radius.

name: Broodmother
effect: Doubles the base stats of summoned Fire Larvae.

name: Soul Eater
effect: Grants a new battle ability. It allows the hero to consume a target corpse, gaining bonus Attack, Defense, and Spell Power until the end of battle.

name: Lord of Chaos
effect: Heroic Strike deals +{0} Damage per each hero attribute point.

name: Progenitor
effect: +{0}% creature growth in all your cities.

name: Unbound
effect: Increases the level of all hero’s spells to their maximum.

name: Unfeeling
effect: Enemy loses all Focus Charges at the beginning of each round.

name: Unfathomable
effect: All enemies always deal minimum and take maximum Damage.

name: Unstoppable
effect: The hero gains +{0} Attack, Defense, Spell Power, and Knowledge.

name: Balthazar’s Bodyguard
effect: The hero gains +{0}% Attack.

name: Silvertongue’s Envoy
effect: The hero gains +{0}% Defense.

name: Amelchia’s Heir
effect: The hero gains +{0}% Spell Power.

name: Great Merchant
effect: Produces +{0} Gold daily.
